com.hp.workpath.api.printer

Class PrintAttributes.PrintFromHttpBuilder

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.hp.workpath.api.printer.PrintAttributes.PrintCommonAttributesBuilder<PrintAttributes.PrintFromHttpBuilder>
      • com.hp.workpath.api.printer.PrintAttributes.PrintFromHttpBuilder
  • Enclosing class:
    PrintAttributes

    public static class PrintAttributes.PrintFromHttpBuilder
extends PrintAttributes.PrintCommonAttributesBuilder<PrintAttributes.PrintFromHttpBuilder>
    Builder for creating PrintAttributes to request using an image residing on the external server and available by HTTP(S) URL.

    The file Uri should be of http:// or https:// scheme

    Since:
    API 1

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      PrintFromHttpBuilder(android.net.Uri httpUri)
      Creates builder with default attributes.

      Color Mode = DEFAULT
      Duplex = DEFAULT
      Copies = 1

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      PrintAttributes build(PrintAttributesCaps caps)
      Combines all of the attributes in this into a PrintAttributes object.
      PrintAttributes.PrintFromHttpBuilder setNetworkCredentials(NetworkCredentialsAttributes networkCredentialsAttributes)
      Sets the network credentials to access source URI

      • Methods inherited from class com.hp.workpath.api.printer.PrintAttributes.PrintCommonAttributesBuilder

        setAutoFit, setCollateMode, setColorMode, setCopies, setDocumentFormat, setDuplex, setEndPageRanges, setFinishingsList, setJobName, setOrientation, setOutputBin, setPaperSize, setPaperSource, setPaperType, setPrintQuality, setStapleMode, setStartPageRanges

    • Constructor Detail

      • PrintFromHttpBuilder

        public PrintFromHttpBuilder(android.net.Uri httpUri)
        Creates builder with default attributes.

        Color Mode = DEFAULT
        Duplex = DEFAULT
        Copies = 1

        Parameters:
        httpUri - File URL of the form 'http://' or 'https://'

        • Ensures that an Uri reference passed as a parameter to the calling method is not empty.
        • Ensures that an Uri reference passed as a parameter to the calling method is not null.

        Since:
        API 1

    • Method Detail

      • setNetworkCredentials

        public PrintAttributes.PrintFromHttpBuilder setNetworkCredentials(NetworkCredentialsAttributes networkCredentialsAttributes)
        Sets the network credentials to access source URI
        Parameters:
        networkCredentialsAttributes - network credentials attributes containing authentication parameters

        • Ensures that an object reference passed as a parameter to the calling method is not null.

        Returns:
        this builder for method chaining PrintAttributes.PrintFromHttpBuilder.
        Since:
        API 1

      • build

        public PrintAttributes build(PrintAttributesCaps caps)
                      throws CapabilitiesExceededException
        Combines all of the attributes in this into a PrintAttributes object.
        Parameters:
        caps - The print capabilities.

        • Ensures that an object reference passed as a parameter to the calling method is not null.

        Returns:
        a PrintAttributes object containing all of the attributes.
        Throws:
        CapabilitiesExceededException - if caps does not contain the set attribute value
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if the fileUri cannot be found or points to wrong location
        Since:
        API 1
